title: primula centellifolia
intro: Primula centellifolia, also known as Kirti, is a plant species belonging to the family Primulaceae, commonly found in the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Primula centellifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial activities. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions.
